arts.ttl: Milos Kerkez: Bournemouth star's transfer decision date 'revealed' amid Liverpool, Man City, Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: Liverpool, Manchester City and Real Madrid reportedly find out when summer transfer target Milos Kerkez will make a final decision on his future at Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: English team overtakes Real Madrid in the race for wonderkid signing
arts.sum: Real Madrid is one of the clubs keeping a close eye on the potential Chelsea-Huijsen transfer . Dean Huijsen, the 20-year-old Spanish centre-back, currently at Bournemouth, has emerged as Chelsea’s top transfer target .

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Alexis Mac Allister speaks out on Real Madrid transfer links after impressive season
arts.sum: Argentine midfielder’s performances have caught the eye of Europe’s most successful club

arts.ttl: Real Madrid ‘on the verge’ of Vinícius Jr. agreement
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid are close to sewing up a contract agreement with a leading member of the club’s attacking ranks. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who…

arts.ttl: Liverpool star cools talk of Real Madrid move – ‘Yes, I read and things reach me, but…’
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reevaluating the idea of bringing in a central midfielder this summer, after Toni Kroos’ absence has proved more difficult than first thought to deal with. One of the names that has been linked to them of late is Liverpool star Alexis Mac Allister. Los Blancos were linked with the Argentina international, and […] The post Liverpool star cools talk of Real Madrid move – ‘Yes, I read and things reach me, but…’ appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Five leading contenders to become Real Madrid manager
arts.sum: Real Madrid are rumoured to be considering change at the season’s end with Carlo Ancelotti’s future unclear. A disappointing European exit against Arsenal has raised question marks over Ancelotti’s role, with Real Madrid also trailing Barcelona in the La Liga title race. The Italian is also a target for Brazil, who are seeking a new […] The post Five leading contenders to become Real Madrid manager first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold warned he's walking into a 'mess' at Real Madrid - 'You get killed'
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been warned against joining Real Madrid this summer because the environment is so ruthless and world's away from the welcoming dressing room at Liverpool

arts.ttl: Two Real Madrid stars have had their contracts extended until July
arts.sum: Two members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid have seen their contract terms extended for an extra month. That’s according to Diario AS, who point towards…

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp's plan for managerial return revealed after Real Madrid snub
arts.sum: Klopp surprisingly took over as Red Bull's global head of soccer at the start of the year, operating in more of a supervisory role. Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp isn't expected to take over another club or national team until the summer of 2026 at the earliest, according to a new report.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti to make tough decision on this key Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Mbappé, on the other hand, did train with the squad on Tuesday and could feature if needed—but Ancelotti prefers to rest him to ensure he’s fresh for the Copa del Rey final. As a result, Ancelotti is expected to make changes to his starting eleven and, more importantly, to the formation, shifting away from his usual setup with Saturday’s final in Sevilla in mind.
